CVE-2025-47711.title: There's a flaw in the nbdkit server when handling responses from  ...
CVE-2025-47711.description: There's a flaw in the nbdkit server when handling responses from its plugins regarding the status of data blocks. If a client makes a specific request for a very large data range, and a plugin responds with an even larger single block, the nbdkit server can encounter a critical internal error, leading to a denial-of-service.

CVE-2025-47712.title: A flaw exists in the nbdkit "blocksize" filter that can be trigge ...
CVE-2025-47712.description: A flaw exists in the nbdkit "blocksize" filter that can be triggered by a specific type of client request. When a client requests block status information for a very large data range, exceeding a certain limit, it causes an internal error in the nbdkit, leading to a denial of service.
